item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-02-23)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 34093 Trending skills: 10810 Hot skills: 1711 Top All Time: find-skills (295021) Top Trending: find-skills (7594) Top Hot: azure-storage (378)

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (2 → 3): azure-diagnostics
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #2 Current rank: #3 Delta: -1 Installs: 4872 (prev 4798) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Debug and troubleshoot production issues on Azure. Covers Container Apps diagnostics, log analysis with KQL, health checks, and common issue resolution for image pulls, cold starts, and health probes. USE FOR: debug production issues, troubleshoot container apps, analyze logs with KQL, fix image pull failures, resolve cold start issues, investigate health probe failures, check resource health, view application logs, find root cause of errors DO NOT USE FOR: deploying applications (use azure-deploy), creating new resources (use azure-prepare), setting up monitoring (use azure-observability), cost optimization (use azure-cost-optimization)

item.title: [Trending] Rank up (3 → 2): azure-observability
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #3 Current rank: #2 Delta: +1 Installs: 4872 (prev 4797) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Azure Observability Services including Azure Monitor, Application Insights, Log Analytics, Alerts, and Workbooks. Provides metrics, APM, distributed tracing, KQL queries, and interactive reports.
